name: Basic Plan
description: Ideal for beginners who want access to essential gym facilities and a simple workout environment.
features: Open gym access during regular hours

name: Standard Plan
description: A balanced option for active members who want classes, coaching, and extra support.
features: Mobile app workout and progress tracking

name: Premium Plan
description: Best for dedicated fitness members who want premium facilities, full support, and advanced recovery options.
features: Mobile app workout, diet, and progress tracking
